inputs.label: Total Bill Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total amount of the bill including tax.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount of the bill including tax.

inputs.label: Tip Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of the pre-tax amount to tip.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of the pre-tax amount to tip.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi öncesi tutarın bahşiş olarak verilecek yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Number of People
inputs.businessContext: Number of people sharing the bill.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of people sharing the bill.

inputs.label: Tax Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount of tax included in the total bill. Used to calculate pre-tax amount for tipping.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of tax included in the total bill. Used to calculate pre-tax amount for tipping.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam faturadaki vergi tutarı. Bahşiş hesaplamak için vergi öncesi tutarı bulmada kullanılır.

inputs.label: Round Up Total Per Person?
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to round the total cost per person up to the nearest whole dollar, otherwise 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 to round the total cost per person up to the nearest whole dollar, otherwise 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişi başı toplam maliyeti en yakın tam dolara yuvarlamak için 1, aksi halde 0.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
